name: 04 Video Transcript Ingest
description: Runnable ingress workflow: submit a URL to VideoTranscriptAPI, poll task completion over HTTP nodes, reuse task.data.transcript, then pass the result through 00 -> 02 -> 03.

parameters.jsCode:
const originalItem = $json.original_item && typeof $json.original_item === 'object' ? $json.original_item : {};
const taskStatus = originalItem.task_status && typeof originalItem.task_status === 'object' ? originalItem.task_status : {};
const taskStatusData = taskStatus.data && typeof taskStatus.data === 'object' ? taskStatus.data : {};

return {
  json: {
    item_id: String($json.item_id || '').trim(),
    source_type: String($json.source_type || '').trim(),
    source_name: String($json.source_name || '').trim(),
    source_host: String($json.source_host || '').trim(),
    original_id: String($json.original_id || '').trim(),
    canonical_url: String($json.canonical_url || '').trim(),
    title: String($json.title || '').trim(),
    author: String($json.author || '').trim(),
    published_at: $json.published_at || null,
    ingested_at: $json.ingested_at || null,
    media_type: String($json.media_type || '').trim(),
    content_text: String($json.content_text || '').trim(),
    content_html: String($json.content_html || '').trim(),
    upstream_task_id: String($json.upstream_task_id || '').trim(),
    upstream_view_token: String($json.upstream_view_token || '').trim(),
    upstream_summary: String($json.upstream_summary || '').trim(),
    content_hash: String($json.content_hash || '').trim(),
    score: $json.score ?? null,
    category: String($json.category || '').trim(),
    tags: Array.isArray($json.tags) ? $json.tags : [],
    dedupe_action: String($json.dedupe_action || '').trim(),
    status: String($json.status || '').trim(),
    vault_path: String($json.vault_path || '').trim(),
    obsidianInboxDir: String($json.obsidianInboxDir || '').trim(),
    summary: String($json.summary || '').trim(),
    reason: String($json.reason || '').trim(),
    enriched_at: $json.enriched_at || null,
    original_item: {
      request: originalItem.request ?? {},
      submit_response: originalItem.submit_response ?? {},
      task_status: {
        code: taskStatus.code ?? null,
        message: String(taskStatus.message || '').trim(),
        data: {
          task_id: String(taskStatusData.task_id || '').trim(),
          view_token: String(taskStatusData.view_token || '').trim(),
          video_title: String(taskStatusData.video_title || '').trim(),
          author: String(taskStatusData.author || '').trim()
        }
      }
    }
  }
};
